div.p: Compile-time branching eliminates debug overhead in production via preprocessor directives.
Engineers can verify the path separation via objdump:
$ objdump -d allocator_debug.o | grep -E "memset|verify|canary" 000010a2: call verify_poison_pattern 000010af: movl $0xcafebabe, (%rax)

text.tspan: /* Debug path: adds checks and metadata */
/* Debug path: adds checks and metadata */

div.p: Latency: 5-10 CPU cycles Cache Impact: 1 line touched Branch Prediction: Always Taken
